Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dragon King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Dragon King may take what he wants if the Akura clan appears weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The Dragon King conducts raids to the north.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Dragon King is gaining influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Dragon King flies over his throne.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Dragon King will do anything to protect his future champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Dragon King is dissatisfied with the turn of events in the contest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Dragon King's willpower is contained in a gust of sand shaped like a snarling serpent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Dragon King was fighting Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Dragon King did not intend to advance despite the threat.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Herald sacred beasts have become scarce since the fall of the Dragon King.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
